title: ECP5 Simulation fails with the latest oss-cad-suite

features.name: duplicate module declaration via double include
features.description: Code should include a header file that declares modules, where the header is included twice into the same compilation unit, causing redeclaration errors when no include guard is present

features.name: missing include guard pattern
features.description: Code should include a Verilog header file lacking the standard `ifndef/`define/`endif include guard, causing duplicate definitions when included multiple times
